caption: The video captures a live event celebrating the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) Foundation Day, as indicated by the text "भारतीय जनता पार्टी स्थापना दिवस" prominently displayed at the top. The scene is split into two frames: on the left, a speaker, adorned with an orange and green scarf, addresses the audience while gesturing with his hands. The background features repeated BJP logos and the party's name. On the right, a group of attendees, also wearing orange and green scarves and caps, listen attentively. The setting appears to be a formal gathering, likely a political event or conference, with a focus on unity and celebration within the party. The overall atmosphere is one of engagement and enthusiasm among the participants.
